final:
module clock_gating_control(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire enable,  
    input wire d,  
    output reg q  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (enable) begin  
            q <= d;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
